title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies in Amritsar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies:
Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hinduja Healthcare Digital Technologies!
